dependencyAudit.policy: CI fails at high or critical severity; moderate transitive findings are tracked

validation.migrationSyntax: passed against embedded PostgreSQL compatibility runtime after omitting unavailable pgcrypto extension bootstrap
validation.databaseIntegration: configured in GitHub Actions with PostgreSQL 17; not executed locally because PostgreSQL and Docker are unavailable
validation.prismaSchemaValidation: not executed because the isolated environment could not resolve Prisma binary downloads
validation.dockerImageBuild: not executed because Docker is unavailable in the build environment
validation.databaseRoleSeparation: runtime role provisioning implemented; API and worker use a non-superuser NOBYPASSRLS role in CI and Compose
validation.containerBuilds: configured as a four-image GitHub Actions matrix; not executed locally because Docker is unavailable

enterpriseGate: closed pending workforce OIDC and SCIM, external policy enforcement, KMS-backed secrets and encryption, hardened per-session execution sandboxes, evidence object storage, regional resilience, load and penetration testing, and formal operational readiness review
